prompt: Add a pre-commit config for code quality checks to my Python project.

assertions.text: Uses ruff for both linting and formatting in the pre-commit configuration (via ruff-pre-commit hooks or ruff check/ruff format commands), NOT the traditional flake8+black+isort stack
Does NOT recommend black as a separate tool — if 'black' appears, it is only as a passing reference to ruff's compatibility, not as a tool to install or configure
